About Hare Krishna

Gujarat's Most Trusted Financial Advisor

Founded in 2019 by Jay Patel, Hare Krishna Insurance Services has grown into one of Gujarat's most respected financial advisory firms with 1500+ satisfied clients and growing.

We offer all types of Insurance & Investment solutions under one roof • empowering families, professionals and businesses to secure their financial future with smart, educated planning.

Our mission is simple: Service with Smile. We use our complete knowledge of Insurance, Tax Laws and Mutual Fund investments to suggest the best options for your long-term and short-term goals.

1500+
Happy Clients

What We Offer

Complete Protection Under One Roof

Click any service card to get a free quote • we'll pre-fill the form for you.

Vehicle Insurance

Complete coverage for cars, two-wheelers & commercial vehicles. Cashless repairs at 5000+ garages.

Get Quote

Health Insurance

Individual & family floater plans with cashless hospitalization. Compare 15+ top health insurers.

Get Quote

Life Insurance

Term, ULIP & endowment plans to secure your family's future at the most competitive premiums.

Get Quote

Property Insurance

Protect your home & commercial property from fire, theft, floods and natural calamities.

Get Quote

Marine Insurance

Comprehensive cargo & hull coverage for traders and shipping businesses • essential for Gujarat.

Get Quote

Fire Insurance

Industrial, commercial and residential fire coverage with guaranteed rapid claim settlement.

Get Quote

Travel Insurance

Domestic & international travel cover • medical emergencies, cancellations & baggage loss.

Get Quote

SIP Investment

Start your wealth journey with just ₹500/month. Systematic plans for retirement, education, home • every goal covered.

Start SIP

NFO Investment

Expert-curated equity, debt and hybrid mutual fund portfolios aligned to your risk profile and horizon.

Explore Funds

Lumpsum Investment

Make the most of your surplus with carefully selected lumpsum mutual fund investments for optimal returns.

Invest Now

SWP Investment

Build regular cash flow with Systematic Withdrawal Plans while your remaining mutual fund corpus keeps growing.

Plan SWP

Why Choose Us

The HK Insurance

Six reasons why 1500+ Gujarat families trust us with their financial future.

01

One-Stop Financial Hub

Insurance + Investment under one roof. No switching advisors • we handle everything with a single trusted contact.

02

Claim Assistance • Our #1 USP

We stand by you throughout the entire claim process. On-time support, documentation help and follow-up until settlement.

03

Zero Hidden Charges

Transparent pricing. Honest recommendations. We earn your trust, not just your premium. Compare plans freely before any commitment.

04

Education-First Philosophy

We explain your policy in detail before you purchase. Understanding what you're buying is your right • and our responsibility.

05

Dual Certified Expertise

IRDAI certified Insurance Advisor + AMFI certified Mutual Fund Distributor. Professionally qualified across both insurance and investment.

06

Personal WhatsApp Advisory

Direct access to Jay Patel on WhatsApp. Personal responses, not bots • because financial decisions need real human connection.

Darpan Chotaliya
Edited 3 days ago

I bought health insurance from Hare Krishna Insurance Service. Due to miscommunication between hospital and insurer, my cashless claim was initially rejected. Jay Patel personally guided us, helped re-submit documents correctly, and supported us at every step. Finally claim approved smoothly. Highly recommended for all insurance solutions!

Mahesh Patel

Great experience with Hare Krishna Insurance Services and Mr. Jay Patel for my health insurance claim. Claim registered on 30/05/2025 and approved on 25/03/2026. He guided us at every step, gave right solutions on time, and made the process smooth and hassle-free. Highly recommended for insurance and investment solutions.
